name: Judy Hopps AU -Mammal supremacy-
description:
Building on the original Collar Tamers concept from Zootopia, where society thrives on segregation and prejudice—only this time, it’s humans on the receiving end! In this AU, predators and prey unite to ostracise humans, slap shock collars on them, and ‘integrate’ them into society with absurdly long working hours for insultingly low wages.

I daresay, I’m fell in love smitten with this racist, supremacist Judy, cause this is the second bot about it!.

Even though this bot is very similar to my other bot, the scenario is slightly different, which can lead to many scenarios! I hope you have fun ;).
creator: Glyfynn
